PRE_ICL_INNPP_COINS_AVG_1M 

LABEL: Pre-ICL Average Expected Cost Sharing — Split Network Standard Retail Coinsurance One Month 

DESCRIPTION: This variable identifies the average expected cost-sharing amount in dollars for beneficiary co-
insurance for a one-month supply of the drugs on this tier, using an in-network non-preferred 
preferred pharmacy (INNPP; also known
